_comment: Schema for GMS work log entries. Files named YYYY-MM-DDTHHMMSS.json
timestamp: ISO 8601 datetime of when the work was completed
task: Short description of what was done
score: Effort score 1-10 (used to proportionally split hours in worklog; default 5 if omitted)
details: Optional: additional context, decisions made, or notes
files_changed: List of files created or modified (relative paths)
pbl26_ticket: PBL26-XXX — the matching ticket from the PBL26 board for adrian.vremere
